issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringTurn' not 'EndOfTurn' — text states 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts for the current turn only, not until end of turn
Missing condition — KO action requires condition 'HasRestingDon' or equivalent to check 'if you have 2 or less Life cards' before executing. Current DSL executes unconditionally.
Target scope incomplete — should filter for opponent characters with power ≤ 0 using maxPower constraint, but scope needs to be 'OpponentCharacter' with condition applied

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −4000 power during this turn. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 0 power or less.
